prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: pyridine.xyz (11 atoms, user-supplied, single-point calculation — not re-optimized). SCF converged in 10 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap; HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV). Integrity trustworthy: yes. No warnings reported. Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --solvent gas --charge 0 --mult 1 pyridine.xyz`.
